title: Implement model performance frontier procedure
description: Implement the model_performance_frontier procedure, deterministic YAML variant helpers, dual-evaluation orchestration, cost/frontier calculations, report artifacts, and focused tests.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting implementation. Created behavior story plx-6001a0 and task plx-5b561b before source changes, per repository workflow.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Implemented model performance frontier procedure.

Changes:
- Added `plexus/procedures/model_performance_frontier.yaml` with Gherkin Specification, deterministic candidate planning, non-champion ScoreVersion creation, dual evaluation dispatch, Pareto rows, and artifact finalization.
- Added Python helper module for ruamel-based YAML variant generation, cost-axis calculation, Pareto selection, and JSON/CSV/HTML artifact rendering.
- Exposed `plexus.model_frontier.{plan,build_result_row,finalize}` through the Tactus runtime.
- Added focused unit/runtime tests and README entry.

Validation:
- `pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_model_performance_frontier.py MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/test_model_frontier_runtime.py` -> 10 passed
- `python -m py_compile plexus/cli/procedure/model_performance_frontier.py MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py` -> passed
- YAML safe-load check -> passed
